PreToolUse.command: node -e "const input = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT || ''; if (/\.(env|keystore|jks|key|pem|p12)/.test(input)) { console.error('BLOCKED: Cannot edit sensitive file (credentials/keys). Confirm manually.'); process.exit(1); }"

node -e "const i = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT || ''; if (/tun2socks\.aar|(^|\\s)(rm|del|remove)\\s+.*libs[\\\\/]/.test(i)) { console.error('BLOCKED: libs/tun2socks.aar is a critical local dependency. Do not delete or modify.'); process.exit(1); }"

PostToolUse.command: node -e "const input = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT || ''; const m = input.match(/app\/src\/main\/.*\.kt/); if (m) { const f = m[0]; const map = {'AppState.kt':'AppStateTest','ApiClient.kt':'ApiClientTest','LicenseManager.kt':'LicenseManagerTest','SecureStore.kt':'SecureStoreTest','VpnManager.kt':'VpnManagerTest'}; const base = f.split('/').pop(); const test = map[base]; if (test) { console.log('SUGGESTION: Run related test — ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest --tests \"com.vizoguard.vpn.**.' + test + '\"'); } }"
node -e "const f = (process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT || '').match(/app\\/src\\/.*\\.kt/); if (f) console.log('SUGGESTION: Run ./gradlew lintDebug to check for lint issues');"
